head.hi: The Ambassador in Japan (Grew) to the Secretary of State

div.p: 174. A press ban has been issued forbidding comment on the reports of the establishment of a monarchy in Manchukuo. Mr. Chao Hsin-po, the chief of the Legislative Yuan of Manchukuo, has been in Tokyo for several weeks and it is reported that he has drafted a constitution for Manchukuo modeled on that of Japan. It is also indicated that this ban is related to that reported in my telegram 168, October 27, 2 p.m. regarding current negotiations between Manchukuo and the administration of North China. The assumption is that the Japanese are trying to bring North China within an eventual Manchukuo monarchy.
